title: IARC science at AGU 2022
summary: Over thirty IARC researchers and students are participating in the 2022 American Geophysical Union fall meeting held both virtually and in Chicago. We hope to connect with our colleagues and friends during the following presentations and events. For those in Chicago, please also stop by the University of Alaska Fairbanks booth (number 2137) which is co-hosted by IARC science communications team. In addition to giving and convening talks and posters, IARC researchers are participating in a press conference for NOAA’s Arctic Report Card. For updates during the meeting, follow IARC on Twitter , Facebook or Instagram . To learn about AGU activities across UAF follow the #UAFxAGU hashtag on social media platforms. For any questions or suggestions, please contact Heather McFarland . Mon., Dec. 12 Tue., Dec. 13 Wed., Dec. 14 Thur., Dec. 15 Fri., Dec. 16 Chicago time / Presenter / Title / Type / Location...

title: The Future of Arctic Governance – El futuro de la gobernanza del Ártico
summary: Pavel Devyatkin examines - in Spanish - Arctic governance in the UN system and intergovernmental organizations. The post The Future of Arctic Governance – El futuro de la gobernanza del Ártico appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
